name: codex-im-gateway
description: Deliver Codex task results to IM platforms and continue their exact threads.

interface.shortDescription: Send Codex results to IM and route replies back.
interface.longDescription: A local-first gateway that durably delivers Codex task results to instant messaging platforms and resumes the exact originating thread when you reply.
